'lTG ft"cq,rr :-1{.? mq m. cfil. f.i. 54 1 ( 31) mtt& 10 ?. 1993 ml Vclilft@? ? ? ? ? amrr:r WIR li. m.q;J.f.t "444(31) ? 26 ?. 2001 :m f.fi<n \ :MINISTRY OF SHIPPING; ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS (Department of Road Transport and Highwnys) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th January, 2009 G.S.R. 58(E).-Whereas, the draft Motor Vehicles (All India Permit for Tourist Transport Operators) •P • AmendmentRules, 2008 were published as required under sub-section (1) of Section .212 of the Motor Vehicles Act, (I) -- 1 of 2 -- Now,therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section ( 14) of Section 88 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby makes thefuliowingrules further to amend the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989, namely (All India Permit for Tourist Transport Operators)Rules, 1993 .- And, whereas, copies of the Gazette in which the said notification was published were made available to the public on the 23rd day of July, 2008; And,whereas, the objections and suggestions received in respect of the said draft rules within the specified period considered by the Central Govemment; 1988 (59 of 1988) in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Shipping, Road Transport and Highways (Department ofRoad Transport and Highways), No. G.S.R. 545(E),datedthel8thJuly,2008 in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i)dated the 18th July, 2008, inviting objections and suggestions from all persons likely to be affected thereby, before the expiry of sixty days from the date on which copies of the Gazette containingthe said notification were made available to the public; 1. (1)These rules mr v be called the Central M?· Vehicles (All IndiaPermitfor· 'ourist TransportOperatoll)' Amendment Rules, 2009. (2) They shaJI come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Cazette. 2. In the Motor Vehicles (All India Permit for Tourist Transport Operators) Rules, 1993, after rule 15, the following rule shall be added, namely :- " 16. Conformity to mass emission standards.- The Tourist Transport C perator shall not engage or use any vehicle for th e purpose of journey, the origin and destination r-f which falls within the National Capital Reg on, unless such vehicle conforms to the mass rmission stRndards@har.!?! Stage-III) specified in sub-rule (14) of rule 115 of the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989.". [F.No. RT- 11011/1/2008-?fVL] SAROJ KUMAR DASII,Jt. Secy. Foot Note :-The principal mies were published vide numberG.S.R. 54l(E),dated the 10th August, 1993 and last amended vide number G.S.R. 444(E), dated the 26th June, 2007.
